Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400 032.

1) Department of Finance Government Circular, No. Earths-2024 / No.44 / Earth-3D. 07.04.2025
2) Chief Engineer, Construction Management Cell, Tribal Development Department No. Avi-
3) Department of Finance Government Circular, No. Earths-2024 / No.44 / Earth-3D. 29.01.2026
The Proposal -
Demand No. T-6 for this financial year 2025-26 under Tribal Components Programme
Main article: Title 4225, Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Backward Classes and Minorities
Capital Expenditure on Welfare, 02 Welfare of Scheduled Tribes, 796 - Under Tribal Areas Application
Schemes, (02) (06) Construction of English Medium Ashramshalas (4225 0532), 53 - Major Constructions,
Regarding the provision of funds under the head of accounts, Reference No. 2 was requested. Accordingly, the funds
The distribution proposal was submitted to the Finance Department. In pursuance of this proposal, the Department of Finance
The issue of disbursement of funds made available for distribution was under consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Under the Tribal Components Programme, Demand No. English Medium Ashram in T-6
Construction (4225 0532), Subject No. 53 - Large constructions or below in the financial year 2025-26
Out of the annual budget provision of Rs. 5,44,00, 000 (Rs.5 crore forty-four lakhs only)
The Controlling Officer and the Superintending Engineer Public Works (Tribal) Board,
Nashik / Nagpur is being approved for distribution and expenditure.
(Rs. in Lakhs)
table_trans: Superintendent Engineer, Public Works (Tribal) Board, Nashik
Superintendent Engineer, Public Works (Tribal) Board, Nagpur

para_trans: Government Decision No: Sha'ab-2025 / Q.No.104 / Q.13
The funds are distributed over the Budgetary Distribution System (BEAMS).
For a total of 6 works mentioned in the attached return, mentioned in Rakana 4.
Spending should be limited.
The disbursement of these funds is being approved subject to the following terms and conditions.
1) The budget release by the concerned Controlling Officer included in Annexure-D.
Expenditure on works only and within administrative sanction / revised administrative limits.
Be careful what you do.
2) The funds mentioned above will be spent only on the 8 works mentioned in the accompanying statement.
Responsibility shall lie with the Controlling Officer and the Superintending Engineer concerned.
3) Through the Superintending Engineer, Public Works (Tribal) Board, Nashik / Nagpur.
Periodic visits to the structures should be made to check the quality of the work, the quality of the old ones.
The works should be reviewed and completed on priority. Funds disbursed appropriately
Be aware of the costs involved.
4) Presented by Executive Engineer, Public Works (Tribal) Department Nashik / Amravati
The funds are being disbursed as per the demand made and the funds will be spent immediately.
Be careful.
5) The report of expenditure from the said disbursed fund shall be compiled and prescribed by the Controlling Officer.
The form should be submitted to the government.
6) Compliance with the terms and conditions prescribed by the Department of Finance through Government Circulars issued from time to time.
The Controller shall be responsible for doing so.
4. The said Government Decision e-Office No. The Department of Finance at 1373031 vide Note No. From 14 to 34
In accordance with the approval granted and as provided in the circulars in Reference C. 1 and 3 to the Finance Department.
is being released.
5. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
